# Team photos

Drop each teammate's headshot in this folder, using these exact filenames (lowercase, no spaces, JPG):

| Teammate | Filename |
|-|-|
| David Park | `davidpark.jpg` |
| Oliver Zhou | `oliverzhou.jpg` |
| Taffy Jackson | `taffyjackson.jpg` |
| Jai Kamdar | `jaikamdar.jpg` |
| Min Heo | `minheo.jpg` |

Recommended: ~256×256 px, square crop, JPG (PNG works too but rename the extension in the README `<img src>` if you use PNG). The team-header renders them at 90×90; anything larger than that is fine, smaller will look pixelated.

Right now this folder has GitHub-avatar placeholders so the README renders. To swap in your real photo, just overwrite the file with the right filename — no edits to the root `README.md` needed.

If you'd rather keep your GitHub avatar than upload a new one, leave the placeholder in place.
